consultations_context_check.name: consultations_context_check
consultations_context_check.value: ("consultations"."consultation_type" = 'pregnancy' AND "consultations"."pregnancy_record_id" IS NOT NULL AND "consultations"."children_id" IS NULL) OR ("consultations"."consultation_type" = 'child_development' AND "consultations"."children_id" IS NOT NULL AND "consultations"."pregnancy_record_id" IS NULL) OR ("consultations"."consultation_type" = 'general' AND "consultations"."pregnancy_record_id" IS NULL AND "consultations"."children_id" IS NULL)

examination_records_subject_check.name: examination_records_subject_check
examination_records_subject_check.value: "examination_records"."children_id" IS NOT NULL OR "examination_records"."parent_id" IS NOT NULL
